items.title: Musk Confronts Microsoft CEO Over Alleged Employee Remarks On Charlie Kirk's Assassination
items.description: Elon Musk has challenged Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella over comments allegedly made by employees of Microsoft’s gaming division, Activision Blizzard, celebrating the assassination of conservative commentator Charlie Kirk. The contentious posts were supposedly made by developers and employees of Activision Blizzard on social media platform X. Musk, in response to the post, tagged Nadella, seeking an explanation for the incident. “What's going on here, @satyanadella?” the Tesla and SpaceX CEO questi

items.title: Wall Street Brunch: Now Is The Meeting Of The Fed Dissent
items.description: Wall Street expects a quarter-point Fed rate cut but sparks could fly at the meeting. FedEx facing earnings headwinds. OpenAI sees lower rev share with Microsoft.

items.title: Broadcom and Oracle's Blowout Earnings Just Proved Why It's Time to Forget the "Magnificent Seven"
